name: tdm-website-nextjs-strapi-modernize
description: TrieDatum marketing website — Next.js 14 App Router front end + Strapi v5 headless CMS + PostgreSQL (npm-workspaces monorepo). Built from the requirements/architecture/test-strategy set in this repo (ADR-005 in A04-2-SOLUTION-ARCHITECTURE/adr/).
comment:workspaces: apps/cms (Strapi) is intentionally NOT a hoisted workspace — its dependency tree (ajv 8) conflicts with the Next.js/ESLint toolchain (ajv 6) when hoisted. See ADR-005. It installs independently via the cms:* scripts below.
